message:
fix(tests): add missing clone() calls for non-Copy hash fields and update bead tracker

- hardware_localization_residual.rs: added .clone() on content_hash
  reads in board_seal_updates_hash test — the field is a String (not
  Copy), so the previous implicit move would have prevented the
  second read from compiling once the borrow-checker became stricter
  about partial-move detection.
- minimized_repro_extraction_integration.rs: same clone() fix for
  repro_hash in test_e2e_finding_with_repro_hash.
- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated bead status tracking entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
